title: RNA Extraction from Filtered Vent/Crustal Fluids or Seawater
author: Julie Huber
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.iuxcexn
materials: Thaw 50 ml tubes with filter on ice.

steps.title: This protocol is adapted from mirVana RNA extraction kit (Ambion)
steps.instruction: This protocol is adapted from mirVana RNA extraction kit (Ambion). Assumes a 47mm flat filter preserved in RNAlater in 50ml tube OR Sterivex filter. Wipe bench top, pipets, racks, with Nucleo-clean, 70% ethanol, and RNAzap wipes.If only extracting half the 47mm flat filter save the remaining half in the 50ml tube with half the RNAlater. If using half of a Sterivex, store remaining filter half in 2ml tube with fresh, filter-sterilized RNAlater.

steps.title: Prepare 15ml tube, add 750ul Lysis Buffer and 0
steps.instruction: Prepare 15ml tube, add 750ul Lysis Buffer and 0.5ml of RNA Powersoil beads (1/2 of tube).

steps.title: Pipette RNAlater into a new 2ml...
steps.instruction: Pipette RNAlater into a new 2ml tube, spin down cells at 12,000xg for 5min, pour off RNAlater, place on ice.- Might need to do a few rounds depending on amount of RNAlater in tubes.- If only extracting half of filter, only remove half of RNAlater volume .

steps.title: Remove filter from tube and place...
steps.instruction: Remove filter from tube and place on sterile/autoclaved piece of foil.

steps.title: Using ethanol-flamed razor blade and forceps,...
steps.instruction: Using ethanol-flamed razor blade and forceps, cut filter in half (if only extracting half). Then cut remaining half into small pieces and place in 15ml tube. If extracting from a Sterivex, use pliers (ethanol-flamed) to crack cartridge, remove filter with razor blade, and cut into 6-8 pieces. Pour RNAlater from cartridge into 2ml tube and spin down as described in Step 3.

steps.title: Add 250ul Lysis buffer to 2ml...
steps.instruction: Add 250ul Lysis buffer to 2ml tube with spun down cells, resuspend by vortexting and add this to 15ml tube.

steps.title: Using adaptor, vortex 15ml tube for 7-10min, at medium-high speed
steps.instruction: Using adaptor, vortex 15ml tube for 7-10min, at medium-high speed.

steps.title: Add 100ul Homogenate additive and place on ice for 10min
steps.instruction: Add 100ul Homogenate additive and place on ice for 10min.

steps.title: Centrifuge tube at 4000xg for 2min at 4ºC
steps.instruction: Centrifuge tube at 4000xg for 2min at 4ºC.10. Remove lysate and place in 2ml tube. Repeat centrifugation if necessary to remove all lysate.

steps.title: Add 1 part acid:phenol chloroform to...
steps.instruction: Add 1 part acid:phenol chloroform to tube (equal to amount of lysate removed) and centrifuge at 10,000xg for 5min. Follow procedure for using phenol, use fume hood, double glove, etc.

steps.title: Remove top aqueous layer and place in fresh 2ml tube
steps.instruction: Remove top aqueous layer and place in fresh 2ml tube. Be sure not to touch the bottom layer!

steps.title: Heat the elution solution to 95ºC...
steps.instruction: Heat the elution solution to 95ºC in heat block (use a small aliquot in a 1.5mL tube).

steps.title: Add 1
steps.instruction: Add 1.25x 100% ethanol. Mix well, and add to filter cartridge in a collection tube provided. Centrifuge at 10,000xg for 15sec, discard the flow through. Filter cartridge can only hold ~700ul, so might need to do a few spins.

steps.title: Add 700ul Wash Solution 1, spin...
steps.instruction: Add 700ul Wash Solution 1, spin at 10,000xg for 15sec, discard flow through.

steps.title: Add 500ul Wash Solution 2/3, spin...
steps.instruction: Add 500ul Wash Solution 2/3, spin at 10,000xg for 15sec, discard flow through.

steps.title: Repeat Step 16
steps.instruction: Repeat Step 16

steps.title: Put the filter cartridge back into...
steps.instruction: Put the filter cartridge back into the tube, centrifuge for 1.5 min at 10,000xg to remove residual fluid from the filter.

steps.title: Transfer the filter cartridge into a...
steps.instruction: Transfer the filter cartridge into a fresh collection tube, apply 50 µl pre-heated (95 ºC) Elution solution to the center of the filter, spin for 30 sec at 10,000 X g; repeat with another 50 µl pre-heated (95ºC) Elution Solution20. Freeze at -80ºC long term. Short term (24-48hrs), RNA can be stored at -20ºC.

steps.title: Carry out DNase Treatment
steps.instruction: Carry out DNase Treatment: adapted from Ambion Turbo-DNAase kit. Set heat block to 37ºC.

steps.title: Transfer 100ul of sample from mirVana collection tube to 1
steps.instruction: Transfer 100ul of sample from mirVana collection tube to 1.5 ml centrifuge tube.

steps.title: Add 10ul 10x Buffer to 100ul RNA
steps.instruction: Add 10ul 10x Buffer to 100ul RNA.

steps.title: Add 1ul Turbo DNAse, incubate @ 37ºC for 20min
steps.instruction: Add 1ul Turbo DNAse, incubate @ 37ºC for 20min.

steps.title: Add another 1ul of Turbo DNase, incubate for 20min more
steps.instruction: Add another 1ul of Turbo DNase, incubate for 20min more.

steps.title: Add 10ul Inactivation Reagent and vortex...
steps.instruction: Add 10ul Inactivation Reagent and vortex on and off for 5 min.

steps.title: Spin tubes @ 10,000xg for 1
steps.instruction: Spin tubes @ 10,000xg for 1.5min.

steps.title: Pipet RNA into new 0
steps.instruction: Pipet RNA into new 0.5ml tube, be sure NOT to touch inactivation reagent.
